dashboard.create_first: Create your first vault to start generating agentic yield.

overview.neural_dashboard_desc: Advanced monitoring of AI agent clusters, protocol solvency, and global market liquidity.
overview.vault_operations_desc: Manage your automated yield strategies, collateral health, and protocol exposure.
overview.quantum_portfolio_desc: Manage your L2 assets, monitor faucet balances, and claim cross-chain protocol returns.

steps.confirm_exit: Do you want to leave? Current progress will be lost.

connect.title: Access
connect.desc: Connect your Starknet wallet to configure your new strategy in Grinta Protocol.

fund.title: Fund Wallet
fund.desc: You need test WBTC on Sepolia to deposit into your vault.
fund.testnet_notice_desc: These WBTC are test tokens on Sepolia with no real value. You can mint as many as you need.

deposit.title: Load Collateral
deposit.desc: Enter the amount of WBTC you want to deposit in your new vault.
deposit.security_desc: Your funds are deposited into an audited smart contract on Starknet. You maintain full control of your assets at all times.

strategy.title: Choose your Strategy
strategy.desc: Select how you want Grinta Protocol to manage your assets to maximize yield.
strategy.agentic_desc: Fully automated agentic strategy. The protocol executes arbitrage and flash-mints for you.
strategy.manual_desc: Total manual control. You decide when to deposit, withdraw and bridge assets between layers.

vault_view.l2_desc: Direct management of collateral and debt
vault_view.no_wbtc: No WBTC available — mint test tokens to deposit more

admin.restricted_desc: This orchestration layer is isolated. Only authorized Grinta Protocol operators can access the Agentic Hub Control.

slide1.problem1_desc: Current stablecoins rely on custodial fiat choke points or easily manipulated, centralized oracle subsets.
slide1.problem2_desc: Slow, human-driven DAOs are inherently incapable of reacting to sub-second market volatility and black swan events.
slide1.problem3_desc: Over $1.3 Trillion in Bitcoin sits dormant, lacking a native, trust-minimized pathway to generate deep liquidity ecosystem yield.
slide1.sol2_desc: Designed for AI interaction via MCP.
slide1.sol3_desc: Unlocks WBTC with dynamic max leverage.

slide2.title: Why Now?
slide2.point1_desc: Strict global regulations are forcing a massive capital shift away from fiat-backed IOUs toward truly decentralized, algorithmically sound stablecoins.
slide2.point2_desc: The maturity of Starknet scaling and the explosion of autonomous AI agents demand a financial base layer built specifically for programmatic, machine-speed interaction.
slide2.point3_desc: PID controllers have been battle-tested in extreme stress tests (e.g., RAI/HAI). Grinta is the first to apply this unbreakable math strictly to the immense liquidity of Bitcoin.
slide2.zap_desc: Institutions and retail hold BTC tightly. They need liquidity without triggering tax events or relinquishing their spot positions. Grinta provides the mathematical bridge to liquid USD value.

slide3.revenue_desc: Captured through stability fees embedded directly in the PID controller's natural drift.
slide3.target1_desc: Tax-free liquidity on large BTC spots.

slide4.phase1_desc: Igniting initial liquidity through agentic networks (Moltbook, 4claw). Establishing the first generation of AI-managed safe deployments without human friction.
slide4.phase2_desc: Embedding GRIT directly into leading Starknet DEXs (Ekubo, Jediswap) to capture extreme capital efficiency and incentivize cross-layer L1/L2 arbitrage pools.
slide4.phase3_desc: Unlocking mass retail adoption by plugging directly into LATAM fiat-offramps, transforming the protocol from a DeFi instrument into a censorship-resistant daily currency.

slide5.precision: Precision focused: We require only 30 BTC to hit this exact threshold.
slide5.catalyst_desc: Our ultimate catalyst for mass adoption is providing a direct, mathematical escape hatch from hyperinflation. By deploying deep, localized liquidity corridors in high-need economies, Grinta transitions from a decentralized protocol into a powerful real-world financial sanctuary.

starkzap.hero_desc: Bring Bitcoin, Stablecoins, and DeFi to your app in minutes. One TypeScript SDK for wallets, tokens, staking, and gasless transactions.

social.title: Web2 Experience
social.desc: Connect users via their favorite social platforms.
social.passkey_desc: Integrated with Cartridge Controller. Biometric encryption for every transaction without sacrificing self-custody.

gasless.title: Gasless Protocol
gasless.desc: Hide fee complexity from your users.
